name: I'd like to place an order for one burger with a side of fries, please. For the burger, could you add cheese, lettuce, tomato, pickles, onions, and a special sauce, and please make sure it's cooked fresh to order? I'd also like to add a second side of fries, extra ketchup, and a medium drink. For an additional item, please include a chicken sandwich with no pickles and extra mayo. If available, I'd also like to add onion rings, a side salad with ranch dressing, and a chocolate milkshake. Please make sure everything is packed together for takeout, and include napkins and utensils if possible.
description: A fakemon that lives in the burger joint around the corner.

moves.name: Put The Patty On The Bun
moves.desc: Working a respectable job at a fast-food joint.

moves.name: Burnt To A Crisp
moves.desc: You failed to cook a burger patty.

moves.name: Can you add pickles to that?
moves.desc: The pickles might be sour enough to stun your opponent.

moves.name: Can you add EXTRA pickles to that?
moves.desc: The pickles are so sour that it stuns your opponent.

moves.name: Extra Onion Slam
moves.desc: Boo Hoo! I'm not crying, you're crying!.
